sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ سُهَيْلَةُ مِنَ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ فِيتَامِينَاتٍ لِلشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Suheila je iz apoteke kupila vitamine za zimu.
sentences.translationEn: Suhayla bought vitamins from the pharmacy for the winter.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَهَا الطَّبِيبُ بِأَخْذِ فِيتَامِينِ (د) فِي الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar joj je savjetovao uzimanje vitamina D zimi.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor advised her to take vitamin D in winter.

sentences.arabic: تَأْخُذُ حَبَّةً وَاحِدَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ مَعَ الْإِفْطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Uzima jednu tabletu svaki dan uz doručak.
sentences.translationEn: She takes one tablet every day with breakfast.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَمْرَضْ هَذَا الشِّتَاءَ وَهِيَ سَعِيدَةٌ بِذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: Nije se razbolila ove zime i sretna je zbog toga.
sentences.translationEn: She did not get sick this winter and is happy about that.
